title: Tashigi Leads the Escape

dialogue.text: Is you and you alone, Caesar!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll cut them all to ribbons....!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro

summary: Tashigi Leads the Escape. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
